intro.title: Tell us you're planning to donate
intro.description: Fill in your details below to generate transfer instructions you can paste directly into your DAF or bank transfer, and to notify us of your intent. If we don't receive your donation within a week, we'll follow up.

email.label: Email address
email.hint: We'll use this to follow up if needed.

anonymity.label: Donor visibility
anonymity.hint: We do not currently publish donor names publicly. If we do so in future, we will only include your name if you have consented here.

options.label: Keep my name and donation anonymous to the public
I am happy for my name and donation amount to be published in future

split.label: How would you like to split your donation across funds?
split.hint: Not sure? [Take our Donor Compass quiz]({quizUrl}) to get a personalised allocation based on your values and risk preferences.

options.label: I defer to Rethink Priorities — allocate however you judge is best
options.sub: We will apply our best current judgment, which may differ from our publicly published split as our research develops.

options.label: I want to adjust the split myself
options.sub: Start from the recommended percentages and edit as you like.

amount.label: Approximate donation amount
amount.hint: This helps us follow up accurately. You are not committing to this amount.

funds.name: Longview Philanthropy's Nuclear Weapons Policy Fund

memo.label: Your transfer memo
memo.description: Paste this into the memo or note field when making your transfer from Daffy or another DAF. This allows us to match your donation to your preferences.
memo.placeholder: Your memo will appear here once you have filled in your name, email, and visibility preference above.

actions.successMessage: We've been notified. If we don't receive your donation within a week, someone from the Rethink Priorities team will be in touch at {email}.
actions.errorMessage: Something went wrong submitting your intent. Please try again or email your donation details to fund@rethinkpriorities.org directly.

validation.missingSplitTotal: a fund split that adds up to 100%
validation.copyWarningPrefix: Please complete the following before copying:
validation.submitWarningPrefix: Please complete the following before submitting:

legal: Contributions to the Rethink Priorities Cross-Cause Fund are irrevocable charitable donations administered by CharityVest, a 501(c)(3) public charity. CharityVest retains ultimate discretion over all disbursements. Contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Rethink Priorities does not provide legal or tax advice.
